title: PLOCAN Leads Construction of Spainâ€™s First Offshore Renewable Hydrogen Plant in the Canary Islands
content: PLOCAN is leading the construction of Spainâ€™s first offshore renewable hydrogen plant as part of the H2VERDE project in the Canary Islands. The plant, co-financed by the Government of the Canary Islands and the EU's Next Generation funds, will produce green hydrogen using solar, wind, and marine energy. With a production capacity of 15,000 kg annually, it will serve as a testing ground for hydrogen use in marine environments, powering industrial vehicles and port machinery. The project aims to promote energy autonomy, decarbonization, and innovation, positioning the Canary Islands as a leader in clean energy and the Blue Economy.
author: Analysts Account
